plugins.name: cherry-pick
plugins.description: Cherry-pick commits from another branch with conflict resolution

plugins.name: merge
plugins.description: Merge a source branch into the current branch with conflict resolution

plugins.name: test-driven-fix
plugins.description: Autonomously fix failing tests by iterating patch → test → revert-on-regression, with a 10-iteration cap

plugins.name: respond-to-review
plugins.description: Respond to every flagged issue on a PR — inline comments and review-body findings — dismissing false positives and fixing valid ones

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Multi-specialist code review of a PR via a sub-agent team

plugins.name: doc-audit
plugins.description: Audit project docs (CLAUDE.md, READMEs, .claude/commands, .claude/skills, architecture docs) for stale claims about the codebase and report findings with suggested fixes
